name: dotnet-artisan
description: Comprehensive .NET development skills for modern C#, ASP.NET, MAUI, Blazor, and cloud-native applications

interface.shortDescription: .NET skills with process-first routing and domain depth
interface.longDescription: Comprehensive .NET development plugin providing skills and specialist agents covering C#, ASP.NET Core, EF Core, Blazor, MAUI, Uno Platform, testing, DevOps, debugging, and cloud-native patterns. Includes version-aware routing, coding standards, and always-loaded simplicity guidelines.
defaultPrompt: Help me design a .NET web API architecture.
Review this ASP.NET Core app for performance and security issues.
Set up tests, CI, and release automation for this .NET repo.
